Udemy Tip: Translate Subtitles in Real Time With a Translation Extension + JS Snippet

Udemy has great courses, but lots of them are in English. If you'd rather watch with subtitles in another language, you can use a browser translation extension to translate the transcript panel — but the video's own subtitle overlay stays in English. This post shares a small JS snippet you can paste into the browser console to mirror the translated transcript onto the video's subtitle overlay in real time.
Drag a Video Onto a `.bat` File to Auto-Generate Subtitles With Python
Following my earlier post on using Python to auto-subtitle videos, I got tired of typing the same command every time. Here's how I built a `.bat` file so you can just drag-and-drop a video onto it.
Subtitling a video is painful — you have to keep replaying to catch the timing. But if a tool can auto-generate 50% of the subtitle blocks for you, the rest is easy. Notes on how to set it up.
